reviews.comment:
Deja mucho q desear la atención tanto en despacho de combustible como en cafetería. Querés hacer parada corta y terminas perdiendo más de 1/2.

(Translated by Google)
The service at both the gas station and the cafeteria leaves much to be desired. You want to make a short stop and end up wasting more than half an hour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvXzVQUWNREAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar muy bueno. Y su restaurante -excelente-, tanto en su ambiente como en su variada carta de platos, como así también sus mozos/a muy agradable y preparado/a para cumplir sus tareas. Los baños para socios en excelentes condiciones.

(Translated by Google)
A very good place. And its restaurant is excellent, both in its ambiance and its varied menu, as well as its very pleasant and well-trained waiters/waitresses. The members' restrooms are in excellent condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdjRIWEh3EAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Un asco la atención.mi tiempo también vale.veinte minutos para despachar combustible a tres vehículos. Estoy pensando en no volver a cargar combustible. Ojo como yo pueden haber unos cuantos. Te pone de muy mal humor. La gente esperando y el personal amontonado en la oficina. Muy desconsiderados con los clientes.😔

(Translated by Google)
The service was awful. My time is valuable too. Twenty minutes to pump fuel for three vehicles. I'm thinking of never filling up there again. I'm sure there are others like me. It puts you in a terrible mood. People were waiting while the staff were crammed into the office. Very inconsiderate of customers. 😔
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvMDRtZHJnRRAB
